channel.title: MYSQL on nonwill
channel.description: Recent content in MYSQL on nonwill

item.title: MYSQL 注册启动 及 停用卸载 批处理脚本
item.description: 注册启动 my_install.bat @echo off set MYSQL_DIR=%~dp0 rem set MYSQL_DIR=%cd% if not "%MYSQL_HOME%"=="" ( if not "%MYSQL_HOME%"=="%MYSQL_DIR%" ( echo MYSQL_HOME=%MYSQL_HOME% != MYSQL_DIR=%MYSQL_DIR% goto my_ends ) ) else ( set MYSQL_HOME=%MYSQL_DIR% echo MYSQL_HOME must be set as MYSQL_DIR=%MYSQL_DIR% ) set PATH=%MYSQL_HOME%bin;%MYSQL_HOME%lib;%PATH% mysqladmin -uroot ping 1>nul 2>nul @if "%ERRORLEVEL%" == "0" ( echo Mysql is running. goto my_ends ) echo "MYSQL_HOME = %MYSQL_HOME%" echo Install and start mysql server ... mysqld --install mysql_srv sc config mysql_srv start= DEMAND rem sc query mysql_srv net start mysql_srv rem sc query mysql_srv mysqladmin -uroot ping 1>nul 2>nul @if "%ERRORLEVEL%" == "0" echo "Mysql started successfully" :my_ends cmd /K 停用卸载 my_uninstall.
